title: Lottery Ticket
overview: Lottery Menon (Bhasi) sells a lottery ticket to a local photographer Venugopal (Nazir). When his number wins the first prize, the ticket mysteriously disappears. There are many suspects while Menon and Venugopal hatches a plan to find the culprit.

trailers.title: Manohari Nin | Lottery Ticket |  K  J Yesudas
